summary: Implements ChannelRepository with full CRUD over the channels SQLite table, handling nullable telegram_id

guarantees: GetByID/GetByTelegramID/GetByUsername return (nil, nil) when row not found — not an error
Create mutates channel.ID and channel.AddedAt in-place via RETURNING
Delete returns a non-nil error if the row did not exist (rowsAffected==0)

effects: SQLite reads and writes on channels table

observations.text: Create defaults SourceType to 'telegram' when blank; CreateNonTelegram defaults to 'rss'. Both are side-effects on the caller's struct.

scanChannel uses sql.NullInt64 for telegram_id — the only field in Channel that may be NULL in the DB. A zero TelegramID in-memory is indistinguishable from an unset one unless callers check SourceType.
All SELECT queries use the same scanChannel helper, centralising the nullable field handling.
Second-highest fan-in file within the storage package — called by refresh, source, tui, and the CLI orchestrator via the Store interface.
